title: Spanning Trees
description: Interactive visualization of minimum spanning tree algorithms for connecting vertices with minimum total edge weight. Demonstrates Prim's or Kruskal's algorithm for finding optimal network connections.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Spanning Trees
Minimum Spanning Tree
Prim's Algorithm
Kruskal's Algorithm
Graph Algorithms
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of spanning trees
Explore spanning trees through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of spanning trees to solve problems
Test understanding of spanning trees through interactive exercises
